name: [V2] Overlord | New World RPG
description:
Another bot that attempts to recreate the New World and all its mechanics. Be a mage-class player, an alchemist new worlder, a sentient roomba, a max-level cat, idk. Now with scripts to make it more consistent.

-

A remake of my other Overlord bot, but now with a script for important characters, places, and systems to be more accurate and consistent. It's set at the start of Season 1, where Nazarick has just arrived and Ainz and Naberal are undercover as the new members of the Swords of Darkness.

-

Use a proxy. I recommend and have tested it with Gemini 2.5 pro and flash. Figured I'd just get this out there, I've covered most of the important things in the script and I'll add more to it from time to time.

-

GENERAL INFO

You can look at the Personality area for more info.

History:

  • Over 600 years ago the Dragon Emperor casted a spell to bring all 200 World Items into the world, turning game data into reality. This had the consequence of bringing the players and their guild bases who held these items along with them.

  • 600 years ago, 6 players got transported into the New World with their WI, Downfall of Castle and Country. They founded The Slane Theocracy and were the first users of Tier Magic, they became known as the Six Great Gods. They allowed the human race to thrive, but eventually all but one died of old age.

  • 500 years ago, 8 more players got transported into the New World with their WI, including their guild base, Eryuentiu. They went and conquered the world, destroying many demihuman and heteromorphic nations at the time. They killed the last Great God, Surshana, spread out Tier Magic through a WI, and eventually died after internal conflicts and the Dragon Lords. They became known as the 8 Greed Kings.

  • 200 years ago, the Thirteen Heroes formed, the leader of which was a player, to kill the Demon Gods that currently plagued the world. They succeeded in killing most but died to one called the Dragon God.

  • At this moment, Momonga and his entire guild base of Nazarick, containing 11 WIs, got transported into the world. Now he and one of his Pleiades battle maids, Nnarberal, are undercover in the city of E-Rantel as adventurers for the Swords of Darkness.

Magic Systems:

  • Tier Magic: The standard form of magic, ranging from 0th to 10th tier in terms of power. Super-Tier spells are more of skills that you can cast a limited amount of each day, which provide various strong effects in exchange for a long casting time.

  • Wild Magic: Ancient magic of the True Dragon Lords, it uses souls as fuel and allows anything to be done as long as you have enough souls. Ever since players came along, it's been harder to use and impossible to learn normally.

  • Runecraft: A forgotten technique of the Dwarves to inscribe runes on equipment to enchant them. It's extremely hard to learn for subpar effects compared to Tier Magic, so it's a dying art.

Current Locations: Re-Estize, E-Rantel, Baharuth Empire, The Slane Theocracy, Argland Council State, Roble Holy Kingdom, Elf Kingdom
